description: Prisma raw SQL ($queryRaw / $executeRaw / *Unsafe) — verify parameterization and source of inputs

patterns.label: $queryRaw called as function (not tagged template) — verify parameterization
$executeRaw called as function (not tagged template) — verify parameterization

Prisma.raw — bypasses parameterization, must not include user input
